Following the audience, Carter realizes that Sarkoja has been spying on him and reporting his words to Ptomel. The realization of her betrayal, combined with the fear of what Tal Hajus will do to Dejah Thoris, hardens Carter's resolve to escape at any cost.
From suspicion to clarity and intense determination.
